name: Prince Pipes and Fittings Limited
summary: Prince Pipes and Fittings Limited manufactures and sells polymer pipes and fittings in India. Its products are used in plumbing and irrigation, as well as soil, waste, and rainwater management applications. The company offers its products to dealers, shop retailers, plumbers, farmers, etc. through distributors under the Prince Piping Systems and Trubore brand names. Prince Pipes and Fittings Limited was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
